title: Student Discipline: Removal by Teacher or Bus Driver
description: Teachers and bus drivers have the authority to remove a student from their classroom or bus when the student's behavior disrupts the learning environment or threatens the safety of others. The policy outlines the steps that must follow a removal, including how parents are notified and how decisions are made about where the student will go next. Understanding this process helps families know what to expect if their child is ever removed from a classroom or school bus.
